description: A Solar Energy Systems Engineer is designing a 2 MW community solar garden on active farmland in Phoenix, AZ. To maintain crop viability and allow tractors to pass beneath the arrays, the system must use single-axis trackers with a low Ground Coverage Ratio (0.20) and an elevated ground clearance (3.0 meters). Create a SAM project using the 'Photovoltaic (detailed)' performance model for this 2,000 kWdc (2 MW) system in Phoenix, AZ. The design must utilize bifacial modules, 1-axis tracking, a Ground Coverage Ratio of 0.20, and a ground clearance height of 3.0 meters. Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/agrivoltaic.sam.
